## What & why

<!-- What does this change, and what problem does it solve? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` is clean
- [ ] `npm test` passes (added a test if this fixes a bug or adds logic)
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] Demo still renders (`npm run dev`)
- [ ] Kept the attribution watermark intact
- [ ] If public behavior changed, the `simple` branch was considered / noted
